# KCG fork — tracked fork-drift test failures (2026-07-23 audit).
#
# These files assert upstream World Monitor production surfaces the fork
# deliberately replaced or rebuilt (Pro paywall & premium gating, Vercel
# edge/bootstrap registries, Convex billing, OpenAPI/product-catalog
# contracts, committed esbuild runtime bundles under api/, CII crons the
# self-hosted pod does not run). The unit CI job runs the full test:data
# glob MINUS this list — 15.7k tests stay enforced.
#
# Rule: NEVER add a file here to silence a new failure in KCG-owned code.
# Only upstream-contract drift qualifies. Groom entries away as the fork
# either restores the surface or deletes the dead upstream code.
